main.name: Corestack Solutions
main.occupation: Operations Automation · Control Systems · Custom Software
main.description: We identify which manual processes are costing your business time and money, and convert them into automated operations with real-time visibility.
main.bio: Corestack Solutions designs and implements systems that eliminate operational losses, reduce risk, and generate actionable information for decision-makers. We don't offer generic solutions: every project starts from a real diagnosis of the client's operation, and our support continues until the solution delivers the return it was designed for.
main.contactmessage: Is there a process in your operation generating losses, errors, or lack of visibility? Tell us how it works today and we'll provide a free diagnosis.

education.degree: Understand the problem before proposing a solution
education.description: We analyze how the client operates today: which processes are manual, where errors occur, what information isn't available, and what that current state costs. The solution comes from the problem — not the other way around.

education.degree: The right solution, not the most sophisticated one
education.description: We define the scope, expected outcomes, and the architecture that addresses the root problem. Every technical decision has a business reason behind it.

education.degree: Development with verifiable deliverables and constant communication
education.description: Short cycles, reviewable deliverables, and direct communication at every stage. No surprises at the end: the client sees progress before the final delivery.

education.degree: The project ends when the client operates with full autonomy
education.description: Staff training, on-site support, and post-delivery adjustments included. Local presence in Tabasco for fast response when needed — not just at the time of delivery.

work.title: Residential access control · iOS & Android app · Live in production
work.description: Access control system for residential communities: automatic entry and exit logging, QR passes for visitors, vehicle barrier automation, and real-time monitoring. Published on the App Store and Google Play.

work.title: Advanced operational control platform · iOS & Android · Live in production
work.description: Access control with integrated payment management, common area reservations, classified alerts with threaded chat, and role-based access profiles. Actively used by residential communities.

projects.title: Residential Access Control
projects.category: Access Control · iOS & Android App · Live in production

testimonials.text: QR Residential Access Control completely transformed how we manage access in our community. The automated barrier system and real-time monitoring gave us full control and peace of mind. Corestack's support throughout the implementation was outstanding.

As a real estate developer, security and access control are top priorities. QR Residential Access Control gave our projects a real competitive advantage — residents love the convenience and we have complete visibility of every entry.
